title: Vegan Egyptian Flatbread
description: A simple, vegan flatbread recipe inspired by Egyptian cuisine. Perfect for dipping in your favorite spreads or sauces.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the rustic bread flour and Egyptian flatbread flour.
Gradually add the water, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1-2 hours.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on how large you want your flatbreads to be.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 6-8 inches in diameter.
Cook the flatbreads in the skillet or griddle for 1-2 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and slightly puffed.
Serve the flatbreads warm, with your favorite dips or spreads.
